reference: Hi, my name is Stavros. I had what felt like a bump on my scrotum, but at the same time, it felt like an ingrown hair. So, I squeezed it and pus came out and it went down a little. Then it came back, so I squeezed it some more and it felt like it popped and it all came out, but I didn’t see anything. I would assume that it broke inside me. Now my right side is only swollen. What do I do? Will it go away or is there something I can do?
text: Hi, my name is Davrit. The hairwood felt like a bump on my scrotum, but at the same time it felt like an ingrown hair. So I squeezed it and pus came out, and it went down a little, then it came back. So I squeezed it some more and it felt like it popped and it all came out, but I didn't see anything. I would assume that it broke inside me. Now my right side is only swollen. What do I do? Will it go away, or is there something I can do?
